description_long: This is a standard-sized basketball with a textured, pebbled brown leather surface and black channel grooves dividing the ball into distinct panels. The ball features bold, stylized yellow and black script branding on one side, and a circular logo with additional markings on another panel. The seams are deeply embossed, providing grip and tactile feedback for handling and dribbling. The surface finish is matte with a slightly grippy feel, typical of basketballs designed for both indoor and outdoor play. There are no visible signs of wear, scuffing, or graffiti, and the inflation valve is not visible in any of the views.
description: A brown, pebbled basketball with black grooves, yellow and black branding, and a circular logo. The surface is matte and grippy, with no visible wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights the stylized yellow and black script branding and the deep black grooves on the ball's surface.
description_view_1: This view shows the circular logo with yellow and black markings, with the branding script partially out of sight.
description_view_2: The script branding is visible from a different angle, with the grooves and pebbled texture prominent.
description_view_3: The branding script is upside down and partially visible, with the rest of the ball showing uninterrupted pebbled texture.
attribute_brand_logo: There is a stylized yellow and black script logo on one panel and a circular logo with yellow and black markings on another panel. The specific brand name is not clearly identifiable.
attribute_panel_pattern: The basketball has the classic 8-panel pattern with black channel grooves dividing the surface into symmetrical sections.
